Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS

Title: Provides for a performance and discharge of duty presumption for certain impairments of health of Nassau county fire marshals
Summary: Provides for a performance and discharge of duty presumption for diseases of the lung of Nassau county fire marshals.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the retirement and social security law, in relation to providing for a performance and discharge of duty presumption for certain impairments of health of Nassau county fire marshals
